issues.description: Second effect (Trigger with ReturnToHand) is completely extraneous and not present in card text. This appears to be from a different card.
Action should be optional (conditional 'may trash'). Current structure forces trash; needs optional wrapper or costAction pattern.
Duration 'EndOfBattle' is correct for 'during this battle', but the optional trash must be properly gated so power boost only applies if trash occurs.
